confront.title: Approach and confront the Wither Storm at X:0 Z:0 — survive the area

wither_storm_survived.title: Survive the full Wither Storm confrontation and emerge alive

subtitle.text: The Wither Storm is at X:0 Z:0 because that is where the previous cycle chose to end.

description: The Wither Storm absorbs blocks as it moves.
It is the previous civilization's final act.
They built it knowing what it would do.
They aimed it at the center of the world.
Cracker's Wither Storm mod makes this unkillable until proper phase.
You need the withered_nether_star from the fight to complete the sequence.
Wither Roses drop in the area when the storm kills mobs.
The storm has been visible for twenty chapters of real time.
You walked toward it on the first day.
→ Confront the Wither Storm at X:0 Z:0 [check]
→ Collect 4 Wither Roses from the area (drop when Wither kills mobs)
